name: Auto Action - Glendale
description_short: Auto Action Glendale is a Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership offering in-house financing for buyers with bad or no credit at 5433 W. Glendale Ave, AZ.
description_long:
Auto Action - Glendale operates as part of the Brijay Automotive Group, a regional used car enterprise with multiple Arizona locations. The Glendale dealership is situated at 5433 West Glendale Avenue, just off the Phoenix-Wickenburg Highway in the northwest Phoenix metro area. With a 4.6-star rating drawn from more than 824 customer reviews, the location has developed a strong local reputation. Its central Glendale position is described as convenient for shoppers coming from nearby communities including Sun City, Peoria, and Deer Valley, and is situated close to local restaurants, shopping centers, and parks.

The dealership's primary business is the sale of used vehicles — specifically cars, SUVs, vans, and trucks — paired with in-house Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) financing. Under the BHPH model, Auto Action serves as both the vehicle seller and the direct lender, eliminating the need for bank or third-party loan approval. Prospective buyers can initiate a pre-approval request through a secure online form on the dealership's website before visiting the lot. The Glendale location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and on Saturdays (hours are listed inconsistently on the site as either 9 AM or 10 AM opening). The dealership is closed on Sundays.

Auto Action positions itself explicitly as a solution for customers with less than perfect or bad credit, underscoring the BHPH model's primary appeal. By handling lending in-house, the dealership sets its own approval criteria and can extend financing to buyers who may have been rejected by conventional lenders. The company markets this as the "Auto Action Advantage" — a streamlined experience where vehicle selection and financing occur in a single visit. The Brijay Automotive Group affiliation suggests a structured operational backbone, and the high volume of customer reviews points to consistent foot traffic and a well-established local presence.

From a consumer finance standpoint, Auto Action fills a genuine gap for credit-challenged buyers who need transportation but cannot qualify for traditional auto loans. However, BHPH financing arrangements are widely known to carry significantly higher interest rates, shorter loan terms, and more frequent payment schedules than conventional auto financing — details the website does not disclose. Consumers should request written loan terms including APR, total loan amount, and payment schedule before committing. The 4.6-star rating across 824 reviews is a genuine positive signal, but buyers are encouraged to compare the all-in cost of a BHPH purchase against alternatives such as credit unions or subprime auto lenders, which may offer more favorable terms.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: 4.6-star rating from 824 customer reviews indicating strong local satisfaction
Part of Brijay Automotive Group — structured multi-brand dealership network
Extended weekday hours open until 7 PM Monday through Friday
Online pre-approval form allows buyers to start the process before visiting the lot
Large inventory explicitly includes cars, SUVs, vans, and trucks
Explicitly welcomes buyers with less-than-perfect or bad credit — no stated minimum credit score
Central Glendale location accessible from Sun City, Peoria, and Deer Valley
cons: Financing rates, APR, and loan terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Saturday opening hours are inconsistently listed (9 AM in one place, 10 AM in another)
Closed Sundays — no full weekend availability
Financing is exclusively tied to vehicle purchase — not usable for other financial needs
No inventory pricing, down payment requirements, or repayment schedules visible online
best_for: Car buyers with damaged, thin, or no credit history who cannot qualify at traditional dealerships
Phoenix metro residents in Glendale, Sun City, Peoria, or Deer Valley needing reliable transportation
Buyers who have previously been denied financing by banks or credit unions
Consumers who need a vehicle quickly and prefer a single-visit buy-and-finance process
diagnosis: Auto Action Glendale is best suited for Phoenix-area car buyers with poor or no credit who need vehicle financing and have been turned away elsewhere. The main caveat is that BHPH dealerships typically charge materially higher interest rates than conventional auto lenders, and Auto Action publishes no loan terms or APR data — buyers must negotiate and verify all financing details in person before signing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Online pre-approval application for bad credit buyers
Financing for buyers with less than perfect credit
Financing for buyers with good credit
SMS transactional and informational notifications via Brijay Automotive Group
